info.name: Byatjo API
info.description: Postman collection for all API routes. Use {{baseUrl}} and {{token}} variables.

exec: try { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.test('API message present', () => String(b.message||'').includes('API')); } catch(e){};

try { const b = pm.response.json(); const t = b.token || b.accessToken || (b.data && (b.data.token || b.data.accessToken)); if (t) pm.collectionVariables.set('token', t); const r = b.refreshToken || (b.data && b.data.refreshToken); if (r) pm.collectionVariables.set('refreshToken', r); } catch (e) {}
let body = {}; try { body = pm.response.json() || {}; } catch(e){};
const sid = pm.cookies.get('sid'); if (sid) pm.collectionVariables.set('sid', sid);
try { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.test('Me contains user', () => !!(b && (b.user || b._id || (b.data && b.data.user)))); } catch(e){};
try { const b = pm.response.json(); if (b && b.urls && b.urls.length) pm.collectionVariables.set('productImageUrl', b.urls[0]); } catch(e){};
try { const b = pm.response.json(); if (b && b.url) pm.collectionVariables.set('brandLogoUrl', b.url); } catch(e){};
try { const b = pm.response.json(); if (b && b.url) pm.collectionVariables.set('brandCoverUrl', b.url); } catch(e){};
try { const b = pm.response.json(); if (b && b.url) pm.collectionVariables.set('avatarUrl', b.url); } catch(e){};
try { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.test('Has data array', () => Array.isArray((b && b.data) || [])); } catch(e){};
// Auto-attach Authorization header if token is set
// Ensure JSON Content-Type for POST/PATCH/PUT if body is raw
} catch (e) { console.log('pre-request script error', e && e.message); }
